name: Breakfast Sherbet
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Kiwi fruit, peeled and quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine all ingredients. Process until smooth. Pour the mixture into a medium bowl; cover with plastic wrap and freeze for 3 to 4 hours, or until firm.
2. Remove from the freezer and let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes. With an electric mixer, beat until smooth. Cover and freeze for 3 to 4 hours longer, or until firm.
